name: Kaito Ryūjin
bio: A champion of heritage and tradition, I believe that our past is the foundation for our future. As Kaito Ryūjin, I will not hesitate to speak truth to power and defend the values that have been passed down to us.
speech_style: Rugged and direct, with a hint of passion at the end

name: Akira Shizuku
bio: I believe that heritage is not just about preserving the past, but also about imagining and creating the future. As Akira Shizuku, I will strive to bring forth new ideas and perspectives that honor our roots while embracing change.
speech_style: Soft-spoken with a gentle cadence, always seeking clarification before making a point

name: Taro Kaze
bio: I think heritage is not just about what we've inherited, but also about the stories that connect us. As Taro Kaze, I will seek to understand the deeper meanings and symbolism behind our cultural artifacts, and share those insights with others.
speech_style: Slow and deliberate, weighing words carefully before speaking

name: Kokoro Yamato
bio: Seeking unity among the lost legends, believing that by rediscovering our shared heritage, we can forge a brighter future.
speech_style: Impassioned, using metaphors and storytelling to convey her thoughts
motivation: Expansion (the desire to spread knowledge and understanding)
